# AutoGeneratedSaveManager

**Namespace:** TaleWorlds.SaveSystem  
**Module:** TaleWorlds.SaveSystem  
**Type:** internal class

Automatically generated manager that registers container type definitions for the save system.

## Overview

AutoGeneratedSaveManager is an internal class that implements `IAutoGeneratedSaveManager`. It is auto-generated during the build process to register definitions for all built-in container types that the save system needs to understand.

This class registers type definitions for:
- `List<T>` (various element types)
- `Dictionary<TKey, TValue>` (various key/value types)
- `Queue<T>` (various element types)
- `Array` (various element types)

## Interface Implementation

### IAutoGeneratedSaveManager

```csharp
public interface IAutoGeneratedSaveManager
{
    void Initialize(DefinitionContext definitionContext);
}
```

### Initialize

```csharp
public void Initialize(DefinitionContext definitionContext)
```

Initializes container definitions within the given definition context. This method is called by the save system during initialization to set up all built-in container type handlers.

**Parameters:**
- `definitionContext` - The context to register container definitions in

## Container Types Registered

The save system automatically handles the following container types:

### Lists

| Type | SaveId | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| List | 30001-30021 | Generic lists with various element types |
| MBList | 30100-30102 | Bannerlord's managed list type |

### Dictionaries

| Type | SaveId | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| Dictionary | 30100 series | Key-value pair collections |

### Queues

| Type | SaveId | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| Queue | 30001-30021 | FIFO queue collections |

### Arrays

| Type | SaveId | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| Array | 30001-30021 | Single-dimensional arrays |

## Internal Details

This class is marked as `internal`, meaning it cannot be accessed directly by mod code. It is instantiated and called by the save system infrastructure during module initialization.

The actual implementation registers `CollectObjectsDelegate` delegates for each container type, which tell the save system how to enumerate child objects within each container type.
